examples.input:
On a dental clinic's website, a user states: "I have a few crooked teeth; can I get them straightened? Additionally, I have a cavity that hurts whenever I eat. Can you treat these together? Please don't make me have any teeth extracted."

2. Cavity repair
3. Orthodontics
